meta.purpose: Canonical source for job-specific resumes, portfolio generation, LinkedIn generation, freelance profile generation

summary: Full-stack systems and DevOps engineer with 4 years of experience building distributed systems, backend platforms, and cloud infrastructure. Designed distributed worker systems processing data from 50+ government portals, event-driven cloud platforms with observability, and automated CI/CD pipelines. Built financial workflow platforms, real-time collaboration systems, and multi-tenant SaaS applications.

projects.name: Tender Procurement Intelligence Platform
projects.business_domain: Procurement intelligence and government tender data extraction

engineering_evidence.architecture_style: Queue-based distributed worker system with Playwright automation and ETL pipelines
core_challenges: Extracting data from 50+ government portals
Running extraction in parallel
Completing full extraction and processing cycles in about 5 minutes per batch
Validating, transforming, and deduplicating extracted data
key_design_decisions: Use queue-based Playwright workers for parallel extraction
Use ETL pipelines for transformation and processing
Use distributed worker fleets to reduce manual effort and cycle time

engineering_impact: Reduced processing from hours of manual effort to approximately 5-minute automated cycles
Enabled scalable procurement intelligence collection from 50+ government portals
Implemented validation, transformation, and deduplication for reliable data processing

projects.name: Event-Driven Processing Platform on AWS
projects.business_domain: Cloud processing platform and asynchronous backend operations

engineering_evidence.architecture_style: Event-driven cloud platform using AWS CloudFormation, ECS Fargate, SNS/SQS, MongoDB, Redis pub/sub, and full observability
core_challenges: Coordinating asynchronous processing across cloud services and background workers
Maintaining observability across API, worker, queue, and infrastructure boundaries
Designing failure handling for event-driven processing
key_design_decisions: Use SNS/SQS for asynchronous buffering and decoupling
Use ECS Fargate for containerized worker execution
Use Redis pub/sub for real-time communication
Build observability with OpenTelemetry, X-Ray, Prometheus, and Loki

engineering_impact: Improved failure isolation, monitoring, traceability, and recoverability in production
Enabled scalable and operable processing architecture for production workloads
Reduced deployment complexity with reproducible environments and rollback capability

projects.name: DevOps CI/CD Pipeline System
projects.business_domain: Software delivery automation and release operations

engineering_evidence.architecture_style: Automated delivery pipeline covering build, test, security scanning, containerization, deployment, monitoring, and rollback
core_challenges: Automating reliable delivery from code to deployment
Ensuring repeatable environments
Integrating validation, security checks, deployment, and rollback
key_design_decisions: Automate build, test, security scanning, Docker containerization, and deployment
Support rollback and zero-downtime deployment patterns
Use Infrastructure as Code to make environments reproducible

engineering_impact: Reduced manual deployment effort and improved release repeatability
Enabled faster, safer, and more consistent release operations
Improved delivery reliability with rollback support and reproducible environments

projects.name: Tax Rebate Processing & Refund Management Platform
projects.business_domain: Tax rebate processing, financial workflow, refund management

engineering_evidence.architecture_style: State-controlled workflow platform for onboarding, verification, document processing, calculation, review, approval, and reconciliation
core_challenges: Replacing manual forms, spreadsheet tracking, and fragmented approvals
Coordinating customer onboarding, identity verification, document processing, tax calculations, staff review, refund approval, and refund reconciliation
Maintaining clear state transitions through a financial lifecycle
key_design_decisions: Build a controlled workflow engine rather than a loose collection of forms
Model the tax rebate lifecycle as explicit stages
Centralize review and approval flow inside the system

engineering_impact: Replaced manual tax rebate tracking and fragmented approval operations
Centralized onboarding, document processing, review, approval, and reconciliation
Improved reliability and auditability of refund workflow execution

projects.name: Handyman Marketplace System

engineering_evidence.architecture_style: Full-stack marketplace platform with frontend, backend, authentication, payments, real-time workflows, and scalable infrastructure
core_challenges: Coordinating marketplace interactions
Supporting authentication and payment workflows
Designing real-time workflows for service marketplace operations
key_design_decisions: Build a full-stack platform rather than isolated marketplace screens
Include scalable backend and infrastructure support
Support real-time workflow behavior

engineering_impact: Enabled marketplace workflows between service participants
Centralized authentication, payment, and workflow operations
Supported scalable marketplace business model

projects.name: Virtual Office - Real-Time Workspace

engineering_evidence.architecture_style: Presence-based collaboration platform with dynamic user states and WebSocket real-time interactions
core_challenges: Representing live user presence and state changes
Delivering real-time interactions between users
Coordinating workspace behavior across connected clients
key_design_decisions: Use WebSocket interactions for real-time communication
Model dynamic user states as first-class workflow data
Build presence into the collaboration experience

engineering_impact: Supported real-time collaboration and user presence in virtual workspace
Made user availability and workspace interaction visible in real time
Improved coordination for distributed workspace activity

projects.name: Briefly - Multi-Tenant SaaS

engineering_evidence.architecture_style: Multi-workspace SaaS platform with role-based access, structured reporting, and real-time workflow automation
core_challenges: Supporting multiple workspaces
Managing role-based access
Structuring reporting and workflow automation
key_design_decisions: Use a multi-workspace model
Build role-based access into the product structure
Support real-time workflow automation

engineering_impact: Supported structured reporting and workflow automation across workspaces
Centralized role-based workflow and reporting
Improved team workflow visibility and accountability

projects.name: CopyFlow - Workflow Management System

engineering_evidence.architecture_style: Role-based document lifecycle system with strict state transitions and permission control
core_challenges: Managing a controlled document lifecycle
Enforcing state transitions
Applying permission control across roles
key_design_decisions: Model document processing as a lifecycle
Enforce strict state transitions
Use role-based permission control

engineering_impact: Controlled role-based document workflow operations
Reduced ambiguity in document lifecycle and permissions
Improved structure and auditability of workflow management

projects.name: Nutrifactor Mobile Commerce Platform

engineering_evidence.architecture_style: Headless Shopify mobile commerce integration using React Native and Shopify GraphQL
core_challenges: Integrating mobile commerce flows with Shopify
Synchronizing inventory and orders in real time
Supporting commerce interactions in a React Native client
key_design_decisions: Use a headless Shopify integration rather than a traditional storefront
Use Shopify GraphQL for commerce data integration
Build the customer experience in React Native

engineering_impact: Delivered mobile commerce experience over headless Shopify backend
Synchronized inventory and orders between mobile app and commerce backend
Enabled mobile shopping and commerce operations

achievements: Designed distributed scraping system with 20 parallel workers processing data from 50+ government portals in approximately 5-minute cycles
Built event-driven cloud platform with AWS CloudFormation, ECS Fargate, SNS/SQS, and observability stack
Automated CI/CD pipeline with Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD, Docker, SonarQube, and Snyk for security scanning
Built state-controlled financial workflow platform replacing manual processes and fragmented approvals
Implemented observability with OpenTelemetry, AWS X-Ray, Prometheus, and Loki for production monitoring
Built multi-tenant SaaS platforms with role-based access control and workflow automation

education.institution: National University of Computer and Emerging Sciences (NUCES LHR)
